programmes.show_description: An investigation into the disappearance of sex workers leads SVU to a horrifying discovery. Rollins and Velasco find a clue among neglected missing persons reports.
A 17-year-old leads her rap crew to a rival's hideout under the guise of a hookup text. When Homicide gets involved, the level of her involvement comes into question.
Dylan and Lizzie work to uncover why an Olympic-hopeful figure skater is killed while on the ice. Ryan's case lands him and Dylan in unusual circumstances.
Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. A mum calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Erin helps a former witness shut down a drug operation in his apartment building.
Danny and Baez team up with two Russian operatives to search for a dangerous Russian man who entered the U.S. on a diplomatic visa.
A Mexican drug cartel targets Danny when he intercepts a shipment of several million dollars; Jaime goes after a serial killer who preys on the elderly.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Danny contemplates retiring until Erin enlists him to help her with a case involving her ex-husband. Jamie and Eddie go undercover as a couple. Frank butts heads with the new mayor.
Frank battles with the mayor about a community parade that is honouring a once-convicted cop bomber. Jamie and Eddy stumble upon a misleading congressman.
Callen, Hanna and the team search for a group of terrorist leaders suspected of murdering an ex-army sergeant.
After an antiques dealer is murdered, the team begin a mission to recover a black book containing top secret information.
The team continues their search for the missing black book.
The team must rely on a former Navy Intelligence Officer with post-traumatic stress to help them close a case.
The team is called in when a dead body carrying a highly-classified residue, used to track persons of interest, is stolen from an autopsy room.
The team are tasked with tracking down Matt Driscoll, a member of the Navy who has been leaking highly confidential information.
Sam goes undercover in prison to investigate a highly secretive terror group. Callen uncovers and pursues a clue to his past.
Ryan and Dylan get their biggest lead in the Sleeping Beauty Killer case, taking them to a faceoff aboard a ship. Dylan receives troubling news from his father.
When the only evidence in a crime is through a church confession, Carisi must find another way to prove his suspect guilty. Benson agrees to meet an old friend seeking to make amends.
Series finale. The SVU provides help and protection for a longtime domestic violence victim, but when she winds in court, Rollins surprises Carisi with a formidable opponent at trial.
Carisi tries Richard Wheatley for the murder of Kathy Stabler. Benson finds herself at odds with a friend when Barba agrees to take the case.
The squad is called in to investigate a wave of hate crimes on Christmas Eve. Amanda catches up with an old flame.
A cheating wife and her lover are in the frame for poisoning her husband, a bestselling historian.
Goren and Eames travel to Vietnam to arrest a man claiming to have killed ten-year-old actress Amberleigh Harner in 1992.
The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Jessica Fletcher must uncover the link between numerous break-ins in New York and the murder of a sleazy aspiring entrepreneur whose body is found in a salon.
Jessica suspects foul play when her friend's estranged husband is killed in what appears to be an accident.
Erin's trial against a human trafficker is jeopardised when the presiding judge is found dead. Mayor Dutton opposes Frank's public safety initiative.
A detective in a mob case is killed. Garrett is accosted outside his home by a SWAT team after a false report.
Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a single mother whose ex-husband has a history of violence. Jamie's efforts to save a woman who overdosed on drugs has unexpected consequences.
When a famous basketball player is found dead in his apartment of an apparent drug overdose, Danny looks into ties to old friends in a local gang.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A case turns personal for Danny when he works to protect a nurse from her violent ex-boyfriend. An acquaintance of Frank's comes to him with a theory regarding the death of an inmate.
When Deeks is shot while trying to stop a robbery, Callen and Sam discover that he is being used as bait in a bigger plan.
Sam resumes a former alias, Hakeem Fayed, and boards a one-way flight to Yemen to track down the leader of a terrorist group.
The unit faces a race against time after a Navy Intelligence Commander responsible for tracking a visiting diplomat disappears.
When a secure facility on a military base is compromised, Kensi goes undercover to find out what the world-class thief was intending to steal.
Eric goes undercover for the first time after a rocket engine expert is murdered.
Deeks is forced to resume an old alias to protect his best friend and chief informant from a group of arms traffickers.
When Benson and Stabler assist in the case of a young girl's shooting, they realise it's more than a typical homicide.
A group of teens terrorising tourists has the SVU squad working overtime; McGrath teams them up with the Bronx gang unit to track down a crucial lead.
A boy disappears after meeting up with an online gamer. Benson suspects her son is being bullied.
